key.query: Four Roses Limited Edition Small Batch 2017 official

emittedEvidence.query: Four Roses Limited Edition Small Batch 2017 official
emittedEvidence.summary:
**Official Four Roses page:** the 2017 **Limited Edition Small Batch** is confirmed as **107.3 proof** and **aged a minimum of 12–15 years**. Four Roses also identifies it as the **2017 Limited Edition Small Batch** release, distinct from the separate **2017 Al Young 50th Anniversary** bottling. ([fourrosesbourbon.com](https://www.fourrosesbourbon.com/bourbon/2017-le-small-batch?utm_source=openai))

A second official Four Roses writeup adds the blend details: this release used **three recipes** — **15-year-old OESK**, **13-year-old OESK**, and **12-year-old OESV** — and says it was the **first
